title: hieracium umbellatum var. latifolium
intro: Hieracium umbellatum var. latifolium, also known as the broad-leaved hawk's beard or broad-leaved hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium umbellatum var. latifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or inflorescence to be used in herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
